metadata.Plot: This movie would be so fun if i were 6 years old or if it was released in 70s. Lots of cliché, nothing new, no good jokes, bad story, stupid dialogs. It is another low level Turkish movie. I just wonder whether the movie makers watch it ever or not, to see how stupid it became when it is completed. A movie will not become funny by just saying bad words like f**k after each sentence. Come on producers directors grown up do some good jokes in comedy movies. If you cannot just leave it to the ones who does it right like Hollywood. Don't waste our time. I am a victim of overly commercialized movie which worths nothing. Unfortunately you cannot tell until you finish it.
metadata.Actors: Çetin Altay, Levent Aykul, Ali Basar
